reviews.title: Eh
reviews.text: The hotel was eh more like a 1.5 star.   We had pizza in the lobby the night before and we cleaned up after ourselves the best we could but the next morning the tables weren’t wiped or anything by staff. The same thing with the pool area, it was cleaned after closing and there wasn’t enough chairs.  We booked the hotel As a staycation with friends specifically for the pool and it was obnoxious not being able to access the pool without a staff using the key, so if you stepped out to pee you needed to to find staff to let you back in. The toilet by the pool had poop stains all in the bowl both days.it was just kinda of gross.  Then the fire alarm went off and there was not warning  from staff that it was real to get out , obviously we did right away but they should have been announcing it as well. ( the motor to the elevator was smoking ) .
reviews.response:
Thank you for taking the time to review our hotel, and for your great rating!
We look forward to serving you again soon, and wish you safe travels!

The rug or the floor was dirty because my feet were dirty from walking barefoot before I realized it was wet. The lighting was poor and the light over the bathroom sink was missing.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
I could not check in room because of my room prior to the one I had was broken into the night before and the room 232 could not even be opened so I checked out and went with family this was my brothers funeral and very distressing 
When I came back to other room and it was broken into not a good place management did not contact me either very bad situation I did not stay I feel I should be compensated for night 
Marthacelest@gmail.com

reviews.title: Comfortable stay with great staff
reviews.text: The room is clean and spacious. Staff is friendly and attentive.

reviews.title: Last night, after a difficult day attending my brother’s funeral, I returned to the hotel only to find the door to Room
reviews.positives:
Last night, after a difficult day attending my brother’s funeral, I returned to the hotel only to find the door to Room 205 wide open and ajar, suggesting someone had broken in. I immediately felt a wave of unease. After speaking with Daya, who graciously assisted me, I was promptly checked out of Room 205 and moved to the more secure Room 232. Which the door of Room 232 was very difficult to open after trying to open the door several times. The maintenance man at the time also had a difficult time opening the door of Room 232. However, my conversation with John revealed that Room 205 has had ongoing issues with the door and nothing has been fixed.

As a loyal Hilton card holder for many years, I am deeply disappointed by this unsettling experience. I have already checked out of the hotel and will not be returning. While I had hoped to discuss this unfortunate situation with you in person, my brother funeral takes precedence, and I will be staying at my family home during this difficult time. I look forward to your prompt response regarding this matter and feel that I should be compensated for this inconvenience.
reviews.negatives:
Last night, after a difficult day attending my brother’s funeral, I returned to the hotel only to find the door to Room 205 wide open and ajar, suggesting someone had broken in. I immediately felt a wave of unease. After speaking with Daya, who graciously assisted me, I was promptly checked out of Room 205 and moved to the more secure Room 232. However, my conversation with John revealed that Room 205 has had ongoing issues with the door.

As a loyal Hilton card holder for many years, I am deeply disappointed by this unsettling experience. I have already checked out of the hotel and will not be returning. While I had hoped to discuss this unfortunate situation with you in person, my brother funeral takes precedence, and I will be staying at my family home during this difficult time. I look forward to your prompt response regarding this matter and feel that I should be compensated for this inconvenience.

reviews.title: Friendly, clean, convenient
reviews.text: Good location and convenient parking and entry/exit from the hotel. Helpful if you have small children still in car seats or strollers, or just plain unruly toddlers. Indoor pool was very clean and tranquil, the use of it was very appreciated by my son. Great place to stay.
reviews.response: Your feedback is integral to our ability to continue to improve our service. We will direct your comments to the proper department. Thank you again for your time and come visit us again soon!

reviews.title: Not relaxing
reviews.negatives: If they are going to charge over$300 for a room don’t give them the room next to elevators. The maids slam doors all morning long. Never try to be quiet at all!!!!!

reviews.title: Reasonable place to stay
reviews.text: Not a top of the line 5 star luxury hotel, but it's not supposed to be.   However, the accommodations were comfortable and the staff was pleasant and helpful.  For the money, it seemed like a reasonable place to stay.  Also nice that they provide breakfast in the morning.  They are close to Hwy 454 and the LIE (I-495), so easy access to other areas.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: Pool
reviews.negatives: Very disappointed..been road tripping and trying different hotels to leave recommendations. Upon entering hotel renovations were happening and was not given discount for interruptions. Tv can’t access wifi or bluetooth..Breakfast was bad and caused diarrhea..The food and coffee was on the first floor. You had to maneuver around the renovations going on. Very unsanitary. The eating area was on the second floor with no coffee or food or anything..Toilet   paper was not enough..and public restrooms within hotel didnt have any. There was garbage all over floor in breakfast area. Not enough supplies given out or not even restocked. And coffee was sitting all day in urns.

reviews.title: Great
reviews.text: They are great
reviews.response: Thank you for the kind review. We are so happy you had a pleasant time with us and that the service at our hotel far exceeded your expectations. Your comments will be shared with our team so they will know their efforts helped make your stay a great one. We value your feedback and look forward to your next visit to Hampton Inn Islandia when you return to Long Island.

reviews.title: The true  heartless Hilton Staff
reviews.positives: The food and the hospitality when they didn't know, I have sleep apnia.
reviews.negatives:
That I was sound asleep and a friend stopped by to visit , he heard my irregular breathing and he got scared and went to the front desk to open the door for him he thought I was in trouble. They asked for his name and they couldn't verify any infortmation . 
So he called the cops , even they were unprofessional. The next morning I wanted to extend my stay and they said because the cops were called and the loud noise( snoring) complaints from other guest  in the building.
 I was told to leave immediately after spending 2 weeks there because I am Between homes. 
That was rude , disrespectful and heartless ........none of whom apologize truthfully , scripted yes.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: The place was ok
reviews.negatives: So when we call to see if the room was ready it was like at 1230 I know some time if you call It might be ready I called and she said no that they will call me when it was ok so I left like at 250 i called because no one called back so I called and the girl said it wasn’t ready that to give them 30 minutes ok so at 3:00 I go and they said to give them a few so at 3:18  the room was ready mind you check in is at 3:00 ok we go to the room  I go shower the tub was clocked so I called and the front girl said she couldn’t fix it and that we had to wait for the maintenance  ok next day we had to be at my sons game by 9 am so I called the front desk and they said I had to wait till the maintenance guy went tru the list so we end up showering  with the tub clocked and when we was about to leave we see the maintenance guy we stopped him and asked at what time he was planning to come take a look and he said well he was able to check  he went and checked fixed it ok so then the last day that we was going to leave check out is at 11 mind you so I called for paper toilet at like 9 the lady said ok and 1030 nothing no paper at all we checked out been trying to call them and no one picks up and nothing they said they was going to give us a 25 dollar discount for the tub clocked and they never gave me the discount they charged me the full amount I called booking.com and they tried to help out because Hampton don’t want to give the discount they said they was or anything so yeah I will never booked in this place ever again well in Hampton in Long Island Islandia again but booking.com was help full they tried there best to help us out

reviews.title: Will never go back.  Always stay at Hampton Inns but will never again stay at the one in Islandia
reviews.positives: Quick check in
reviews.negatives: Very noisy.  People in and out all night.  Loud music.  Very noisy to close to the expressway.  Rooms need updating and are very dark.

reviews.title: Great Location. Bring earplugs
reviews.positives: Great location. Excellent breakfast.
reviews.negatives:
I want to rate this hotel better. It was clean and comfortable. Also, the breakfast was very good.

However, every time I’ve stayed, I’ve had a terrible issue with noise. I’ve been placed in the room that is about 15 feet from the LIE offramp. There was noise all night from cars and trucks and I couldn’t sleep.

Also each time I’ve stayed there, there have been groups of adolescent children travelling for school events. That’s fine and I wish them well. However they were allowed to run up and down the hallways, slam doors,  and scream until about 1 am in the morning. I try to sleep long before that.

Also, the hotel allows dogs which is great. I love dogs. However, during my last day there was a dog staying there who would not stop barking. He barked all night long. I don’t feel this is fair to other guest.

So even though it’s a great location, make sure you bring your plugs if you choose to stay here

Also there was a nice stain on the top bed cover. We asked for a walk in shower and got a tub.  I couldn't get in or out without assistance. Very disappointing. Not like the Hampton Inns I've been in the past.

reviews.negatives: Their breakfasts were very disappointing.  Inadequate seating, inadequate food.  Also rate changed from what we were originally quoted.

reviews.title: We will not stay here again when we visit our family in Smithtown, NY!
reviews.positives: The staff were very friendly and accommodating.
reviews.negatives: - Location was too noisy, being close to a major highway and commercial activity. Breakfast was the same every day, no variety, rubbery cheese omelette s and undercooked sausage. The last day we stayed there was no coffee at breakfast!🙄 The room had minimal amenities and the sheets didn’t fit well, not enough towels. We had our grandchildren with us and were shocked to see an inebriated guest stumbling around barefoot in the lobby at one point!😡

reviews.title: Find better. I booked a queen room, maybe the king is cleaner.
reviews.positives: The only thing I liked was the comfort of the bed.
reviews.negatives: The room was dirty, felt like we got someone else’s room that wasn’t there for the night. To our joy a spider was waiting for us right in the mirror. Had to kill it(my boyfriend) so that was great! And the $10 parking sign took my out but the front desk agent never said anything about it so I wasn’t going to. But I had this odd feeling that if I woke up to a tow I would’ve went in!!!!

reviews.positives: Room temperature was good
reviews.negatives: Bed was very low; no bulb in the light fixture above sink; kids in 228 had a Birthday party, didn't want to complain,  but they were very loud,  very late (past midnight). Quite a contrast from our stay last month.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.negatives: Being close to a lot of traffic which we didnt realize made it hard to sleep. We were also close to families with young children

reviews.title: Nice stay in a good, Central Long Island location.
reviews.positives: Good location and easy access to restaurants, parks and other venues. Ample parking and easy to enter and exit the building. Large room with a lot of light. Breakfast was typical for a hotel. Nothing stood out.
reviews.negatives: The bed and mattress were not good. A large room should have a least a queen sized bed. Double bed for a tall couple isn't adequate. Plus the mattress was old and saggy. We both woke up with sore backs.

reviews.title: Served its purpose but definitely not a repeat place to stay for us.
reviews.positives: The staff was friendly and accommodating. Facility was clean.
reviews.negatives: Walls are very thin!!! Could hear not only noise from outside but conversations going on in rooms adjacent. Clearly an older facility that they’ve tried to improve upon but def not up to the standards of most Hampton Inns. Bathroom was very small.

reviews.title: Friendly staff , pleasant stay always . I have already book another few nights stay

reviews.title: Free parking, free breakfast, friendly service, comfortable accommodations
reviews.positives: Location was near stores restaurants and my event
reviews.negatives: Convenience

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.positives: Tana and Nina were at the front desk when we arrived. We were traveling all day to Long Island from Raleigh NC, so that we could attend a funeral. These two ladies were great. They immediately calmed us down and gave us cookies and water bottles and spoke so nicely. They really made a difference. The room was comfortable and the breakfast was very good.
reviews.negatives: The hotel is located right off the LI Expressway. There is a lot of traffic, so it could be a little noisy overnight. The weekend traffic is less and quieter.

reviews.title: It was good for a one night stay.
reviews.positives: Breakfast options were somewhat limited but sufficient. It would have been nice to see turkey bacon or sausage as alternatives to pork, and there were no gluten-free options available. The room itself was comfortable — the heating system worked perfectly, and the bed was pleasantly firm. While there were no extra pillows provided, we did find an additional blanket in the closet. The shower was excellent, with great water pressure.
reviews.negatives: Breakfast options were limited, and my request for a first-floor room wasn’t accommodated. I was assigned to the third floor instead. I did arrive before 3pm so I did not say anything.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Room was clean. Great location.

reviews.title: Would stay here again in a heartbeat!
reviews.positives: Very clean!! Staff was wonderful, so very helpful and kind.

reviews.title: It was great and I definitely stay again.
reviews.positives: Everything went well. My wife and I enjoyed out stay. We would certainly stay again. Also recommend to friends and family.
reviews.negatives: The pool was a little cold. And the chlorine level were a little high. But I assuming because its public use its to fight germs and bacteria, which is understandable.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: There are many things to do near by, the place was clean and the staff was friendly.

reviews.title: Decent would stay again

reviews.negatives: The air in room 274 wasn’t working correctly it wasn’t extremely hot but it wouldn’t always blow out cold air either

reviews.title: Relaxing family time
reviews.positives: I loved the waffles, muffins, and coffee.
reviews.negatives: I had a wonderful time. I liked everything.

reviews.title: Great place, a little pricey for.the facilities.  Great breakfast
reviews.positives: Updated, clean good parking close to building
reviews.negatives: Sidewalks are getting rough and a trip hazard, couch in room 219 was worn looking

reviews.title: Great Stay despite no cleaning service
reviews.positives: We had a 3 day, two nights stay. The location was perfect for all the activities we planned to do in the area, the breakfast was actually good, my children especially enjoyed the waffle maker station. The pool area was clean and we mostly had it to ourselves, great pool hours.
reviews.negatives: Staff were friendly and checking in on us via text. However, not once during our stay did our room get cleaned even after I requested. We also would leave for hours at a time and we were staying on the first floor. Every time I would walk to the front desk to ask for garbage bags (I had to replace myself) staff were in the back room talking or having meetings leaving the front unattended and having me wait a long time before being noticed.

reviews.title: It was a wonderful experience.
reviews.positives: The location is highly desirable, the workspaces are well-maintained, and the staff are accommodating. The swimming pool and fitness center are in excellent condition. The room was spacious, and the lighting was sufficient.

reviews.title: We came for my son to take a stressful exam, and our hotel stay was completely relaxing.
reviews.positives: We were checked in by two exceptional people at the registration desk, both named Christina. They made sure we knew everything we needed to know and felt welcome; they also helped us out when we realized my son had left his toothbrush at home by providing not only a new toothbrush, but toothpaste and mouthwash too.

reviews.title: met our needs we were in town for a funeral
reviews.positives: clean
reviews.negatives: bit pricey for one night

reviews.title: Comfortable short stay in a convenient location.
reviews.positives: The checkin was lengthy, but the room we got was good- quiet and comfortable. Liked having a fridge and microwave. The bed was comfortable and the pillows were great. I enjoyed the morning breakfast with omelets, sausage and hot waffle maker.
reviews.negatives:
The manager did not accept my Hilton Honors membership card which entitles guests to free parking since I booked through a 3rd party - Booking.com. That’s awful.
However I had called in advance and spoke to someone about my stay to attend a funeral and he said parking fee was free for Hilton Honors. I asked her to check on the note he left and she acquiesced to waive the $10. charge.
Also, there was no hair dryer in our room. We called the front desk and they sent up an older model which had very low power. Did not completely dry my hair before I had to leave. They need to update their appliance.

reviews.title: For the Night
reviews.positives: Bed was clean and comfortable. AC was rather powerful.
reviews.negatives: Didn't stay long enough to really pick out any negatives, it'd be nice if the TVs were newer to allow smartcast

reviews.title: Convenient and relaxing and reasonably priced.
reviews.positives: Friendly staff, close by restaurant and shopping, gym was convenient and clean, pool was well kept. Room was clean and very comfortable. Breakfast was also very good.
reviews.negatives: My door needed to be serviced. I had to hold my room key up to the lock and wait till I heard I click.
